events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need decide pass/fail. Scenario: energy source missed (stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor). LOTO under review. OSHA 1910.147 requires all energy sources be identified and isolated, including stored energy. Missed stored energy = non-compliance, dangerous. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? Stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor can cause serious injury or death if unexpected release. Critical maybe. Need choose. The schema risk options low/medium/high/critical. Missing stored energy is high/critical. Since energy source missed, potential unexpected energization, severe. I'd choose critical. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 70. Value irrelevant 0. Sound etc default. Findings: stored energy source not identified/isolated; LOTO incomplete. Actions: identify all energy sources, release/verify stored energy, apply locks/tags, retrain, re-inspect. Rationale. References: OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) energy control program, (d) energy isolation, (f) release from stored energy, (a)(2)(ii) types. Need valid JSON only. Ensure no prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 70,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "A stored energy source (hydraulic/gravity/capacitor) was missed during LOTO setup.",
    "LOOTO procedure is incomplete because not all hazardous energy has been identified, isolated, and verified.",
    "Unexpected release of stored energy could occur during service or maintenance."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop work and re-establish the energy control procedure.",
    "Identify and document all energy sources, including stored hydraulic, gravitational, and electrical capacitor energy.",
    "Isolate, dissipate, restrain, or otherwise render safe all stored energy and verify zero energy state.",
    "Apply appropriate lockout/tagout devices and verify effectiveness.",
    "Retrain affected personnel on comprehensive energy source surveys and re-inspect before close-out."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires an energy control program that identifies all energy sources, isolates them, and releases or restrains stored energy before servicing. Missing a stored hydraulic/gravity/capacitor energy source means the LOTO is incomplete and creates a risk of unexpected energization or release, so the work fails compliance.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(1) - Energy control program",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d) - Energy isolation",
    "OSHA 1910.147(f) - Release of stored or residual energy"
  ]
}
